---
applyTo: ["**/*.css", "**/*.scss", "**/*.jsx", "**/*.tsx", "**/*.html", "**/*.vue", "**/*.svelte"]
description: "Frontend UI layout, visual consistency, accessibility, and responsive behavior rules."
---

# Frontend UI Rules

- Prioritize alignment, spacing, typography consistency, and visual simplicity.
- Reuse existing components and design tokens.
- Avoid unnecessary cards, shadows, gradients, and visual clutter.
- Ensure text does not overflow, overlap, or become unreadable.
- Preserve keyboard and screen-reader accessibility.
- Validate meaningful UI changes with browser or screenshot checks when feasible.
